calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, THE HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY OF THE STATE OF MISSOURI.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ALLYSON HARMON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,342.08
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,325.52
Attorney's Fees: $1,966.84
Costs: $499.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $38,133.44
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
